title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0134 11-13 Whiteladies Road, Bristol, BS8 1PH
body: "Type of application:  Application for Planning Permission and for relevant demolition of an unlisted building in a conservation area  Applicant name:  Urban Creation (11-13WLR) Ltd  Site address:  11-13 Whiteladies Road, Bristol, BS8 1PH  Description of proposed development:  Demolition of the rear annexe and delivery of 4 terrace PBSA houses with associated landscaping and other works  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   TBC  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 6 November 2025   Date by when representations must be made 10 December 2025   Hearing date and venue TBC   Target Decision 2 January 2026   Decision date 2 January 2026     Hearing Documents  Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 130 KB, 5 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 10 December 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, c/o QUADIENT, 69 Buckingham Avenue, Slough, SL1 4PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0134 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     Application Form  (PDF, 2.05 MB, 14 pages)  CIL Form  (PDF, 3.65 MB, 6 pages)  Planning Statement Final  (PDF, 1.84 MB, 63 pages)  2131 400 P1-Location Plan  (PDF, 122 KB, 1 page)  2131 401 P1-Existing Site Plan  (PDF, 69.9 KB, 1 page)  2131 402 P1-Proposed Site Plan  (PDF, 198 KB, 1 page)  2131 403 P1-Floor Plans  (PDF, 137 KB, 1 page)  2131 410 P1-North Elevations  (PDF, 273 KB, 1 page)  2131 411 P1-West Elevations  (PDF, 334 KB, 1 page)  2131 412 P1-South Elevations  (PDF, 193 KB, 1 page)  2131 413 P1-East Elevations  (PDF, 245 KB, 1 page)  2131 414 P1-House Sections and Stores  (PDF, 172 KB, 1 page)  2131 415 P1-Colour Elevations...
